## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm check` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this changes a published package
- [ ] Core (`packages/core`) stays dependency-free (provider/runtime deps live in strategy/adapter packages)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if the public API changed
